ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), RecordType.DeveloperName = "Client_delivery_request", CONTAINS ("Data Solution:Solvency",TEXT(Type)), ISPICKVAL(Status, "In Service"), Vermillon_Report_ID__c ="" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You need to fill in Vermillon Record ID on this Work Together Process before it can be closed. If you don't have this ID, please request this ID to Client Delivery Team.
